bupt.ta.service

类 AdminService.CapacityAlert

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.AdminService.CapacityAlert
  • 封闭类:
    AdminService

    public static class AdminService.CapacityAlert
extends java.lang.Object
    Job posting that has reached its selection capacity.
